2024.finalStandings_note: Georgia Peaches won championship 7.5-6.5 over Rockwall Rhinos. Albuquerque Predators (formerly Ramirez's Fight Club) had best regular season record.

categoryKings.pitching_dominance: Florida Easy Money (QS, WHIP) + Saravejo Archdukes (ERA)

2025.champion_note: Salt Lake City Sluggers (fka Lake Havasu City Sea Chickens) won 7-7 tie on tiebreaker vs Albuquerque Predators

championships.note: Formerly Lake Havasu City Sea Chickens
